channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spider-like creatures reveal unexpected origins of fatherhood
item.description: Citizen scientists helped researchers solve a long-standing mystery about how parental care evolved in harvestmen, using photos and observations.

item.title: Future moon landings may erase clues to Earth's life origins
item.description: A new study warns that spacecraft exhaust could quickly contaminate the moon's most scientifically valuable regions, potentially masking ancient clues about life on Earth.

item.title: Alzheimer's tau protein has a surprising secret role in memory
item.description: Researchers found that tau is essential for turning new experiences into lasting memories by helping organize the brain's memory-storing cells. The mo...

item.title: Physicists recreate black hole energy extraction in the lab
item.description: Researchers have recreated the physics of extracting energy from a spinning black hole using a stationary device that produces synthetic ultrafast rot...
